emails.body: HPL Meter #981525 Texoma D/P- GSU HPL Daren: On 1/5/99, the above meter recorded flow 1,703 Mmbtus. Currently, this volume is booked to the HPL Strangers Gas Contract. Logistics needs approval to writeoff this volume to Unaccounted for Gas Loss. ___________ APPROVAL to Writeoff the volumes to Unaccounted for Gas Loss Please print, approve, and return original to me. Thanks, Clem
